product: Databricks Apps support for Lakebase resources
tagline: Databricks Apps now supports adding Lakebase database instances as app resources.
what_it_does: Databricks Apps now supports adding Lakebase database instances as app resources. You can then include these resources as environment variables and access them from your app code. Add Lakebase databases as Databricks Apps resources to persist data across deployments.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Databricks Apps now supports adding Lakebase database instances as app resources. You can then include these resources as environment variables and access them from your app code.
key_takeaway: Databricks Apps now supports adding Lakebase database instances as app resources.
